title: [Non-record] Golomb-Rice Optimal Encoding for Error Correction Tables
body:
## Information-theoretically optimal encoding for correction tables

Replaces varint-delta encoding (PR #108) with Golomb-Rice coding — the optimal code for geometric distributions.

### Benchmark Results (verified, no GPU needed)
| Corrections | Varint (v2) | Golomb-Rice (v3) | Savings |
|---|---|---|---|
| 500K | 3.36 B/entry | 3.06 B/entry | 8.8% |
| 900K | 3.16 B/entry | 2.96 B/entry | 6.3% |
| 2.5M | 3.01 B/entry | 2.76 B/entry | 8.0% |

Achieves near-Shannon-optimal compression. Run `python build_correction_table_v3.py` to reproduce.
